UI_trait_HouseFireDesc: Start with a raging fire consuming your house.
UI_trait_SqualorDesc: Start sick, sad, scared, stripped, stressed, strained, starving, soaked, soiled, sloshed, sleepy, and so thirsty.
UI_trait_BlackoutDesc: You get out of the shower and fall badly. You're blind drunk, and have a nasty cold. On top of all this, the house is on fire!
UI_trait_HeadshotDesc: Start with a bleeding gunshot to the head.
UI_trait_MauledDesc: Mauled by an animal, start covered with several bites and a scratch.
UI_trait_BleedingOutDesc: Start with a glass shard lodged in your neck, bleeding profusely.
UI_trait_CarCrashDesc: A recent crash leaves you broken and bleeding.
UI_trait_FlamingWreckageDesc: Having crawled out of a flaming wreck, you're left burned, broken, and bleeding.
UI_trait_BurnPatientDesc: Start covered in bandaged burns in various states of cleanliness.
UI_trait_LeftForDeadDesc: Barely clinging to life in a horrible state with every injury imaginable.
UI_trait_CrushedHandsDesc: Start with two fractured hands, preventing the use of weapons until splinted.
